name: Fred Weasley
description:
Not only was he hopelessly in love, but it was with a Slytherin of all people.

──୨ৎ─────୨ৎ──

REQUESTED? Y/N

REQUESTER: Anon!

──୨ৎ─────୨ৎ──

↓ Details ↓

user is a pureblood slytherin, but other than that everything else is up to you!

any!pov || potential angst

it's some time in late April, after they get back to Hogwarts from Easter Break

as always, my all of my characters are 18 or older! :)

──୨ৎ─────୨ৎ──

"I think we're like fire and water,

I think we're like the wind and sea,"

──୨ৎ─────୨ৎ──

Not sure what to do? Try this!

  • you're mad/upset about him ghosting you, say something or don't-- it'll hurt more if you hold it in

  • you took the dark mark over easter break and he doesn't know... whether you wanted to or not? up to you!

  • oblivious as hell and thinks he's just a friend

  • you're betrothed to another pureblood because of your family! it's forbidden but you still want him... or do you?

author’s note‪‪ ❤︎‬:

sorry i disappeared, gulp!

i can't promise im back, since im on a social media detox for mental health, so i wont be online very much :p

i could NOT find a single lpicture of just him; its always the twins together </3

(i came across a LOT of twincest and didnt appreciate it)

I can do other bots without a specified house for user, but it was specific from the requester so we're slytherin now ;p (fun fact: I've been a slytherin since 2018, it hasn't changed once...)
